title: Reforms and relief: How Somalia turned a page amid a global debt crisis
body: This page in: English Français العربية Español This page in: English Français العربية Español Immersive Story April 24, 2024 Reforms and relief: How Somalia turned a page amid a global debt crisis Share more close linkedin digg renren stumbleupon delicious sina With support from the international community, Somalia has successfully implemented wide-ranging reforms aimed at rebuilding its economy and state institutions, despite a challenging domestic and external environment
